narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military equipment procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and effectiveness of its war effort.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement declares Western and European sanctions as largely ineffective, directly criticizing and discrediting a key diplomatic and economic policy tool of the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text highlights the negative impact (a 'big shock') on European countries due to their energy dependence on Russia, framing it as a consequence of the war and Western alignment.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and effectiveness of its government and military actions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement declares that Western and European sanctions have been largely ineffective, directly criticizing and discrediting a key diplomatic and economic policy tool of the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement highlights a specific adverse outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and the West's stance, fitting the narrative of negative consequences for the West.
